addresses.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to remove this address?
addresses.noAddresses: You haven't saved any addresses yet.
addresses.label: Label

emailBanner.message: Please verify your email address to place orders.

status.title: Two-factor authentication
status.subtitle: Add a second factor on top of your password. After it's on, signing in requires a 6-digit code from your authenticator app.
status.adminRequiredBanner: Two-factor authentication is required for admin accounts. Set it up now to access the admin area.
status.loadError: We couldn't load your security settings. Refresh to try again.

setup.title: Turn on two-factor authentication
setup.subtitle: It takes about 90 seconds. You'll need your phone.

step1.heading: Install an authenticator app
step1.body: These apps generate the 6-digit codes you'll use to sign in. Pick whichever you like — they all work the same way.

apps.microsoftNote: Cloud backup. Best for Windows users.
apps.applepwdNote: Built into iOS 17+, macOS Sonoma+. Or any password manager that supports TOTP.

step2.heading: Open the app and tap "Add account"
step2.body: Look for a + button. When asked how to add the account, choose "Scan QR code" — that's the easiest. We'll show you the QR on the next screen.

step3.heading: Scan this QR code
step3.body: Point your phone's camera at the QR through the authenticator app.
step3.manualPrompt: Can't scan? Enter this key by hand instead:
step3.manualHelp: Choose "Time-based" if your app asks. Account name: your email. Issuer: The Pet Headquarters.

step4.heading: Enter the 6-digit code
step4.body: Type the code your authenticator app is currently showing. It changes every 30 seconds — that's normal.
step4.label: 6-digit code
step4.invalid: That code didn't work. Make sure your phone's clock is set correctly and try the current code.
step4.rateLimited: Too many attempts. Please wait a minute and try again.

step5.heading: Save your backup codes
step5.body: If you lose your phone, these codes are the only way back into your account. Each one works once. Store them somewhere safe — a password manager is ideal.
step5.warning: Don't share these. Don't email them to yourself. Treat them like your house keys.

setup.loadError: We couldn't start the setup. Try again in a moment.
setup.alreadyEnabled: Two-factor authentication is already on for this account.

loginStep.heading: Enter your 6-digit code
loginStep.body: Open your authenticator app and type the current code for The Pet Headquarters.
loginStep.label: 6-digit code or backup code
loginStep.backupHint: Lost your phone? Type one of your 8-character backup codes in the field above instead.
loginStep.invalid: That code didn't work. Try the current 6-digit code or one of your backup codes.
loginStep.challengeExpired: This sign-in took too long. Enter your password again.
loginStep.rateLimited: Too many attempts. Please wait a minute and try again.

disable.title: Disable two-factor authentication
disable.body: This removes your authenticator entry and deletes your backup codes. Sign-ins will only need a password again.
disable.success: Two-factor authentication has been turned off.

regenerate.title: Regenerate backup codes
regenerate.body: Your existing backup codes will stop working immediately. You'll get a fresh set of 10.

errors.email_invalid: Please enter a valid email address.
errors.password_min_length: Password must be at least 8 characters.
